channel.title: Posts on Grim Chronicle
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Grim Chronicle

item.title: The Zodiac Killer: Everything We Know About America's Most Infamous Unmasked Murderer
item.description: The Zodiac Killer terrorized California in the late 1960s, sending taunting letters to police and the press. Decades later, the case remains officially unsolved. Here is everything we know.

item.title: Chernobyl: The Night the Soviet Union Lied to the World
item.description: On April 26, 1986, reactor number four at the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant exploded. What followed was not just a nuclear disaster — it was one of the most catastrophic cover-ups in modern history.
